message:
fix(verifier-economy): fail-closed capacity enforcement for attestations and disputes

Replace blind eviction of any oldest entry with safe terminal-only eviction:

- Add evict_oldest_terminal_attestation(): only evicts Published or Rejected;
  also removes corresponding fingerprint from attestation_fingerprints
- Add ensure_attestation_capacity(): returns ERR_VEP_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED if
  full of live (Submitted/Disputed) entries
- Add evict_oldest_resolved_dispute(): only evicts disputes with non-None outcome
- Add ensure_dispute_capacity(): returns ERR_VEP_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED if full
  of unresolved disputes
- Refactor file_dispute() borrow pattern: read-only get before capacity check,
  then mutable re-borrow after
- Add ERR_VEP_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED error code
- Add tests: attestation rejects when full of live entries, dispute rejects
  when full of unresolved entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
